candidate.description: Common patterns for caching API responses: cache-aside, write-through, write-back, refresh-ahead, and TTL-based invalidation.

l2s.scope_1line: Caching full HTTP responses at edge or reverse proxy layers.
Pinning a client to one backend for session affinity.

l1s.scope_1line: Patterns for storing frequently accessed data closer to consumers.
Distributing work across servers using algorithms and health checks.
Strategies for keeping cached data consistent with source of truth.
